personalization_hooks: STRONG ANGLE: Jeff is a Red River College Design & Construction Technology grad (1999, C.E.T.). Same Winnipeg trades-college community Ahmad can leverage for shared-alumni open.
Joined Thomas Design Builders in 2002 — 24 years at the firm. President-track lifer; he values long-term sub relationships, not one-off bids.
Background explicitly in construction estimating + project management — he reads bids closely. Ashrah's accurate-takeoff pitch lands.
TDB has been design-build since 1980 — 45+ years of repeat-client commercial work; getting on the bid list is a long-term annuity.
22-employee shop at 2395 Unit C McGillivray Blvd — small enough that Jeff personally responds.
